title: R102 road closure due to roadworks
description: GEORGE NEWS - Due to roadworks on the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Due to roadworks on the Maalgate Bridge, the R102 roadway will be closed on Monday, 18 August.

This date might shift due to unforeseen circumstances to 19 August.


> Motorists may use the N2 as an alternative route.


The public is requested to be patient and exercise caution when using alternative routes.

READ MORE: Progress with Maalgate Bridge upgrade

Any queries related to this closure may be directed to the traffic safety officer (TSO): Mr Gerrie du Preez at 074 237 3993.

The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safer, for you.

Image: Google Maps

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
